scripts.build:mac: npm run build:changes && electron-vite build && electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.yml --publish always
scripts.build:win: npm run build:changes && electron-vite build && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.yml --publish always
scripts.build:all: npm run build:changes && electron-vite build && electron-builder -mw --config electron-builder.yml --publish always
